title: Fit test - All screens are properly translated to different languages
scenario: Verify all screens in the Fit Test flow are properly translated across different languages for both successful and failed scenarios
steps: Set the device language to a supported language (e.g., Spanish, French, German, etc.)
Proceed through all UI steps of the Fit Test flow for a successful fit test scenario
Observe and verify that all text, labels, buttons, and messages are properly translated
Repeat the Fit Test flow for a failed fit test scenario
Observe and verify that all text, labels, buttons, and messages are properly translated in the failed scenario
Repeat steps 1-6 for each supported language
expected: All screens during the Fit Test flow (both successful and failed scenarios) display properly translated text in the selected language without any untranslated strings, truncation, or formatting issues.
